Connect WalletEN
Mantle Rewards Station
Ongoing
The Mantle Liquid Staking Protocol (LSP) is a permissionless, non-custodial ETH liquid staking protocol deployed on Ethereum L1 and governed by Mantle. Mantle Staked Ether (mETH) serves as the value-accumulating receipt token. Additionally, a separate liquid restaking product (cmETH) under Mantle LSP, is set to launch soon.

$COOK
Not connected
$COOK was introduced as the new governance token for Mantle LSP, empowering stakeholders to actively participate in decisions regarding development and strategic direction.
How to Participate
Step 1
Lock
Lock your MNT in Rewards Station from Homepage.
Step 2
Lock-In Period
Select a longer lock in period to increase your MNT Power.
Step 3
Earn
Check your $COOK allocation and claim them when they are available.
FAQs
1. What is $COOK?
2. How do I claim $COOK rewards?
3. How are the rewards calculated?
